root_text.sn26.8:1.4: yo dhammataṇhāya uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo, rogānaṁ ṭhiti, jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
root_text.sn26.8:1.5: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, rūpataṇhāya nirodho …pe…
root_text.sn26.8:1.7: yo dhammataṇhāya nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho, rogānaṁ vūpasamo, jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo”ti.

translation_text.sn26.8:1.2: “Mendicants, the arising of craving for sights …
translation_text.sn26.8:1.4: craving for ideas … is the manifestation of old age and death.
translation_text.sn26.8:1.5: The cessation of craving for sights …
translation_text.sn26.8:1.7: craving for ideas … is the disappearance of old age and death.”
